meta.title: bored? chatGPT!
meta.description:
This video also showcases the fun that can be had with chatGPT. The computer interacts with chatGPT to ask funny questions and receive funny answers that make everyone laugh. The video demonstrates how chatGPT's AI can be a great way to spend time and have fun with others.

Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

00:00 Intro
02:09 What ChatGPT is?
02:29 Creating memes with chatGPT
04:40 Fun rap song
05:54 A.I. Simpsons
07:53 End

The tools the computer use to create the movie:
HarmonAI:
https://www.harmonai.org/
ChatGPT
https://openai.com/blog/chatgpt/
Open A.I. GPT-3 playground:
https://beta.openai.com/playground
Midjorney
https://midjourney.com/home/?callbackUrl=%2Fapp%2F
Dall-e 2
https://openai.com/dall-e-2/


watch the prompt video
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RUatYr6PZdo&t=2s

contact to nobody or the computer: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
